(tabs)/account.title: Account
(tabs)/account.description: Edit Profile (button), Saved Addresses (button), Payment Methods (button), Saved Restaurants (button), Notification Preferences (button), Language (button), Support Center (button)

(tabs)/chat.description: scrollable list. Type your support question... (text-input), Where is my order? (button), Missing item (button), Wrong item (button), Request refund (button), Change delivery instructions (button), Food allergy or safety (button), Send (button)

(tabs)/index.title: Home
(tabs)/index.description: Need help? (button), Open Cart (button), Bottom Sheet Test (button), Modal Component Test (button), All (button), Italian (button), Asian (button), Healthy (button)

(tabs)/orders.title: Orders
(tabs)/orders.description: scrollable list with selectable rows showing status, rows navigate to /order/[param]/tracking, /order/[param]/help. Track (button), Need Help (button), Start an order (button)

(tabs)/settings.description: Notifications (button), Appearance (button), Language (button), About (button), Privacy Policy (button)

(tabs)/support.title: Support
(tabs)/support.description: scrollable list. Type your support question... (text-input), Where is my order? (button), Missing item (button), Wrong item (button), Request refund (button), Change delivery instructions (button), Food allergy or safety (button), Send (button)

(tabs)/two.description: Edit Profile (button), Favorites (button), Order History (button), Saved Addresses (button)

about.title: About DashBite
about.description: About DashBite, What this app demonstrates, Support behavior, Offline and local mode, Food delivery support demo powered by @mobileai/react-native.

addresses.title: Saved Addresses
addresses.description: scrollable list with selectable rows showing name. Used for checkout (button)

cart.title: Cart
cart.description: scrollable list. dashbite10 / hungry20 (text-input), Remove (button), Browse Restaurants (button), Apply (button), Proceed to Checkout (button)

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Electronics (button), Fashion (button), Home & Garden (button), Sports & Outdoors (button), Books & Media (button)

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Change address (button), Change payment method (button), Place Order (button), Back to Cart (button), Delivery from (AIZone)

edit-profile.title: Edit Profile
edit-profile.description: Full Name (text-input), Email (text-input), Phone (text-input), Bio (text-input), Save Changes (button)

favorites.title: Saved Restaurants
favorites.description: scrollable list showing name, rows navigate to /store/[param]

invite-friends.description: Friend's email address (text-input), Copy Code (button), ✓ Invite Sent! (button), Send Invite (button), 📤 Share via Other Apps (button)

item/[id].title: Item Details
item/[id].description: Add to Wishlist (switch), View Reviews & Questions (button), Add to Cart (button)

item-reviews/[id].title: Reviews
item-reviews/[id].description: Type your question about this product... (text-input), Price Drop Alerts (switch), Notify on New Reviews (switch), ✍️ Write a Review (button), Submit Question (button)

language.title: Language
language.description: English (button), Arabic (button), Spanish (button), French (button), German (button), Japanese (button)

menu-item/[id].title: Menu Item
menu-item/[id].description: No onions, extra sauce, ring bell... (text-input), toggle (switch), Return Home (button), − (button), + (button), Select required options (button), Add to Cart (button), Back to menu (button)

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Push Notifications (switch), Email Notifications (switch), SMS Notifications (switch), Deal Alerts (switch)

order/[id]/help.title: Order Help
order/[id]/help.description: Go to Orders (button), Previously reported (button), Delivery delays (button), Missing items (button), Go to Live Support Tab (button), Need Help With Order (AIZone)

order/[id]/tracking.title: Track Order
order/[id]/tracking.description: scrollable list showing status. Go to Orders (button), Open Support (button), Back to Orders (button), Order (AIZone)

order-history.description: scrollable list showing status and price, rows navigate to /order/[param]/tracking

payment-methods.title: Payment Methods
payment-methods.description: Default (button), In real app, add/remove methods from account profile. (button)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Privacy Policy, Last updated: March 2026, Data Collection, AI Agent, Third-Party Services

review-thanks/[id].description: View Rewards Program (button), Back to Reviews (button)

rewards.description: New Reward Opportunities (switch), Weekly Exclusive Deals (switch), Milestone Alerts (switch), Invite Friends (button)

store/[id].title: Restaurant
store/[id].description: scrollable list with selectable rows showing product image and product name, rows navigate to /menu-item/[param]. Back to Home (button), Unavailable: (button), Delivery fee $ (AIZone)

support/article/[id].title: Support Article
support/article/[id].description: Open Help Center (button), Ask support about this (button), Ask support about this (AIZone)

test-ui.title: Overlay Test Lab
test-ui.description: Type something... (text-input), Share your thoughts... (text-input), Enter code... (text-input), Type inside modal... (text-input), Push Notifications (switch), Simulate Secure Action (button), Modern Pressable (Recommended) (button), Legacy TouchableOpacity (button)

write-review/[id].description: Summarize your experience (text-input), What did you like or dislike? How do you use this product? (text-input), ★ (button), ☆ (button), 👍 Yes (button), 👎 No (button), Submit Review (button)
